title: Hips and Peaches Ties References
description_caveat: The curator describes this as a compilation of hip and peach tie and hip-harness videos, explicitly says it is not an endorsement, and advises viewer discretion.

content_use.reason: This is a multi-creator discovery index. Each video requires separate provenance, caption capture, factual review, and safety review before any training-QA use.

access_observation.scope: Snapshot observations, not permanent availability claims.
access_observation.caption_interpretation: A missing caption track means captions were not exposed in this anonymous player response; it does not prove that an authenticated browser has no transcript.
